demo.title: See It In Action
demo.description: Watch how judgment state shifts during a real AI conversation. Click through the turns to observe JSV changes and DV deltas in real-time.

jsv.title: Judgment State Vector (JSV)
jsv.waiting: Start the conversation to see JSV observations

dv.title: Delegation Vector (DV)
dv.waiting: DV appears after the first state change

note.label: Note:
note.text: This demo shows a "Gradual Delegation" pattern. The human starts with clear ownership but progressively defers to AI suggestions. Notice how cognitive_engagement shifts from Active to Passive.
